/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/login_system.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/login_system.dir/sql/sqlconnpool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/login_system.dir/usersControl/UsersManage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/login_system.dir/controller/LoginController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/login_system.dir/controller/queryController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/login_system.dir/controller/papersController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/login_system.dir/controller/chatController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/login_system.dir/query/FaissQuery.cpp.o -o login_system  /usr/local/lib/libdrogon.a /root/workfolder/basic/external/Log/lib/libLog.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so -lpthread -ldl -lz -lssl -lcrypto -lmysqlclient /root/workfolder/basic/external/faiss/lib/libfaiss.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopenblas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopenblas.so -lm -ldl /usr/local/lib/libtrantor.a -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
